curation_notes: Patch commit 6e3b98f identified from git log between v3.10.5 and v3.11.0 tags as 'fix(GHSA-qcp4-v2jj-fjx8): validate handler trap target against registered proxy target'. Only 1 non-test source file changed (lib/bridge.js). Location derived from advisory description which explicitly names BaseHandler.getPrototypeOf as the reachable exploit entry point; the patch adds validateHandlerTarget() calls to all proxy trap methods. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern since all handler classes are defined in bridge.js. Pre-assigned as command-injection from CWE-94, but the patch adds authorization checks (handler-target validation via a WeakMap) that enforce an isolation boundary — reclassified to auth-bypass since the root cause is a missing access-control invariant on the sandbox boundary, not unsanitized input passed to shell commands.
